label: HR
blurb: The company's people footprint, live. Headcount by site, open roles + days-open from the careers feed, and (illustrative) retirement risk.

markers.label: Carnaxide / Lisbon
markers.detail: The SDO / IT delivery hub — 9 open roles (SAP Data Engineer, ServiceNow, Analytics Lead, Senior Tax Analyst, Sourcing). The site STG is staffing up hardest, for the group ERP rollout.

markers.label: Dominican Republic
markers.detail: Largest site. 5 open roles — all SAP ERP-support consultants (San Pedro de Macorís support centre, FI/MM/PP/EWM). *Retirement-risk illustrative.

markers.label: Bethlehem, PA
markers.detail: Cigars International HQ. 5 open roles incl. IT Application Security, Senior Network Engineer, SEO + retail. Oldest ~52 days.

markers.label: Copenhagen / Gentofte
markers.detail: Group HQ. 2 student-assistant roles (Legal & Public Affairs, People & Culture).

markers.label: Richmond, VA
markers.detail: Forged Cigars commercial office (Sutliff factory here closed Feb 2025). 1 open role (Director, Trade & Channel Marketing) — the oldest strategic vacancy at ~118 days.

markers.label: Indonesia — Semarang
markers.detail: 1 open role (Head of Finance & Accounting, Pandaan).

markers.label: Belgium — Lummen/Westerlo
markers.detail: Machine-rolled cigar workforce. 1 standing technician requisition (continuously reposted, so not counted as an ageing vacancy).

markers.label: Honduras — Danlí
markers.detail: Handmade cigar workforce. No open roles in the latest crawl.

agentNote: Open-positions + days-open come from STG's public SuccessFactors careers feed (careers.st-group.com). Strategic sites are mapped to markers; US retail / cigar-bar roles are counted in the total but bucketed (not the strategy). Evergreen 'talent pool' posts are excluded. Real one-time pull 2026-06-14; a scheduled refresh first-seen-stamps each role to derive days-open. Retirement-risk is illustrative (needs PeopleHub).
